# Coinvestopedia
> Institutional-grade crypto exchange research and comparison platform.

## Key Pages
- /exchanges — Compare 50+ exchanges with Coinvesto AI Score™
- /whale-tracker — Real-time institutional capital flow and whale alerts
- /tools — Crypto fee calculators, yield comparators, and rebalancing tools
- /macro-intel — Institutional-grade macro research and market intelligence
- /research — Deep-dive institutional reports

## About
Coinvestopedia provides AI-synthesized research scores for cryptocurrency exchanges covering security, fees, liquidity, and compliance. Our platform is designed for finance professionals and institutional investors seeking high-signal data in the crypto markets.

## Brand Values
- Institutional Precision
- Data-Driven Intelligence
- Educational Excellence
- Absolute Transparency
